name: Wireless Headphones
description: Over-ear Bluetooth headphones with 30-hour battery life and active noise cancellation. Premium 40mm drivers, foldable design, built-in mic. Supports multipoint connection to two devices.

name: Smart Watch
description: Tracks heart rate, blood oxygen, sleep stages, and stress. 5-day battery, water-resistant 50m. Built-in GPS, NFC payments. Works with Android and iOS.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: Tenkeyless with Cherry MX Brown switches. Per-key RGB, hot-swappable switches, detachable USB-C cable, double-shot PBT keycaps. N-key rollover for gaming.

name: Laptop Stand
description: Adjustable aluminium stand for 11-17 inch laptops. Six height settings, folds flat for portability. Anti-slip silicone pads, supports up to 10 kg.

name: USB-C Hub
description: 7-in-1 hub: 4K HDMI, 3x USB-A 3.0, SD/microSD readers, 100W PD charging. Plug-and-play, aluminium body. Compatible with MacBook, Dell XPS, all USB-C laptops.

name: Wireless Mouse
description: Bluetooth 5.0 + 2.4GHz dongle. Ultra-quiet clicks, 4000 DPI sensor. Rechargeable 60-day battery, USB-C fast charge. Works on any surface including glass.

name: Portable SSD
description: 1TB with 1050 MB/s read speed. USB 3.2 Gen 2, USB-C. Drop resistant 2m, IP55 dust/water rated. 256-bit AES encryption. Pocket-sized, 58 grams. Works with PC, Mac, PlayStation, Xbox.

name: Webcam HD
description: 1080p with auto-focus and light correction. Dual stereo mics with noise reduction. 78-degree wide-angle lens, privacy shutter. Plug-and-play USB-A. Great for calls and streaming.

name: Gaming Monitor
description: 27-inch QHD 165Hz IPS, 1ms response. FreeSync + G-Sync compatible, HDR400. 95% DCI-P3 color. Height adjustable stand. 2x HDMI 2.0 + DisplayPort 1.4.

name: Noise Cancelling Earbuds
description: True wireless with adaptive ANC and transparency mode. 8hr battery + 24hr case. IPX5 water resistant. Spatial audio, touch controls. Wireless Qi charging case.
